name: Client Proxy
description: Allows users to use Kirka's Built-in Proxies ;3
features: Persistent proxy selection saved across sessions

name: News System
description: Displays customizable news cards with categories and rich media
features: Fetches news data from remote repository

name: Discord Rich Presence
description: Shows what you're doing in Kirka as your Discord status
features: Shows current page/menu (lobby, leaderboard, market, servers, etc.)
Master toggle to disable/enable all RPC

name: Performance Enhancements
description: Optimize your gaming experience with performance tweaks
features: Unlimited FPS - Remove the 60fps cap for smoother gameplay
In-Process GPU - Run GPU in the same process for better performance

name: Activity Tracker
description: Track your kill statistics and weapon usage in real-time

name: Custom Keybinds
description: Customize keybinds to toggle the in-game menu
features: Supports modifier keys (Shift, Ctrl, Alt, Win)

name: Streamer Mode
description: Hide sensitive information while streaming or recording
features: Hide all usernames and short IDs

name: Account Management
features: Switch between accounts with one click
View account name, tag, and level

name: Auto Token Capture
description: Automatically captures and saves your Kirka JWT token

name: Client Features Browser
description: Browse and search all available client features

name: Tools & Resources
description: Access useful tools and resources for Kirka

name: Other Clients
description: Discover other Kirka clients from the community

name: FAQ System
description: Frequently asked questions about the client

name: Gun Tracker
description: Tracks kills and weapon usage for the active player
